name: SentinelOne, Inc.
summary: SentinelOne provides the Singularity Platform, an AI-powered autonomous cybersecurity platform for enterprises. The platform uses Static AI, Behavioral AI, and Streaming AI models to prevent, detect, and respond to cyberattacks across endpoints, cloud workloads, identity credentials, IoT devices, and unmanaged devices. It features Purple AI for generative AI-driven security operations and a Singularity Data Lake for storing and querying petabytes of security data. Revenue was $1.0 billion in fiscal 2026.

products.name: Singularity Platform
products.description: AI-powered autonomous cybersecurity platform covering endpoints, cloud workloads, identity, IoT, and unmanaged devices with multi-tenancy support.

products.name: Purple AI
products.description: Generative AI technology that unifies platform experience, supercharges security operations, and delivers threat-hunting capabilities.

products.name: Singularity Data Lake
products.description: Proprietary cloud-based data stack enabling ingestion, correlation, and querying of petabytes of structured and unstructured security data.

products.name: Static AI
products.description: AI model that predicts file-based attacks including zero-day threats with precision in milliseconds.

products.name: Behavioral AI
products.description: AI model that models, maps, monitors, and links behaviors to create contextual narratives called Storylines for threat detection.

products.name: Streaming AI
products.description: AI model that detects anomalies by correlating multiple data feeds with external and internal data sources.
